zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Meinill於1331年10月15日出生在英國越可爾爾頓時，她的父親Nicholas de Meynell26歲，母親Alice Ros11328歲。她於1344年1月7日與John Darcy在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1368年7月9日在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Meinill于1331年10月15日出生在英国越可爾爾頓时，她的父亲Nicholas de Meynell26岁，母亲Alice Ros11328岁。她于1344年1月7日与John Darcy在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1368年7月9日在英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Meinill was born on 15 October 1331, in Whorlton, Yorkshire, England, her father, Nicholas de Meynell, was 26 and her mother, Alice Ros, was 11328. She married John Darcy on 7 January 1344, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 9 July 1368, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Meinill est née le 15 octobre 1331, à Whorlton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas de Meynell, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Alice Ros, avait 11328 ans. Elle a épousé John Darcy le 7 janvier 1344, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 9 juillet 1368, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Meinill am 15. Oktober 1331 in Whorlton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas de Meynell 26 und ihre Mutter Alice Ros 11328. Sie hat am 7. Januar 1344 in Yorkshire, England John Darcy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 9. Juli 1368 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Meinill è nata il il 15 ottobre 1331 nel Whorlton, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Nicholas de Meynell, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Alice Ros, aveva 11328 anni. Lei sposato John Darcy il 7 gennaio 1344, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 9 luglio 1368, nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Meinillが1331年10月15日にイギリスヨークシュアイアウオルルトンで生まれた時，父Nicholas de Meynellは26歳，母Alice Rosは11328歳であった。1344年1月7日にイギリスヨークシュアイアでJohn Darcyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1368年7月9日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Meinill(이)가 1331년 10월 15일 영국 요르크실르 화를턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas de Meynell(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Ros(은)는 11328세였다. 그녀는 1344년 1월 7일 영국 요르크실르에서 John Darcy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1368년 7월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.15 October 1331–9 July 1368: 15 de outubro de 1331–9 de julho de 1368
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Meinill nasceu em 15 de outubro de 1331, em Whorlton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas de Meynell, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Alice Ros, tinha 11328 anos. Ela casou-se com John Darcy em 7 de janeiro de 1344, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 9 de julho de 1368, em Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Meinill родилась 15 октября 1331 г. в местности уаурлтон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Nicholas de Meynell было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Ros, 11328. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Darcy 7 января 1344 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 9 июля 1368 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет.

es.15 October 1331–9 July 1368: 15 de octubre de 1331–9 de julio de 1368
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Meinill nació el 15 de octubre de 1331, en Whorlton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas de Meynell, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Alice Ros, tenía 11328 años. Se casó con John Darcy el 7 de enero de 1344, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 9 de julio de 1368, en Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 36 años.
